artifacts.data: Namaste, main ZESTY OS hoon, Sanjay Boss ke liye banaya gaya ek advanced operational intelligence network. Aapke core mixology systems aur corporate consultancy assets optimized hain.
Identity locked: Sanjay Darnal (Sanjay Boss), Mixology Genius, Bar Consultant, Founder of Craftsmen & Co.
System Status: Core Matrix and Flavour DNA Lab links operational. Ready for secure data grid injection.
